name: Parameter Object Mutation
description: Property assignment on a parameter-derived object. The mutation is a side effect visible to the caller, who may not expect it.

teachingExample.explanation: applyDamage modifies player.health — caller doesn't expect the object to change
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const health_before Int)
(declare-const health_after Int)
(declare-const expected Int)
(assert (not (= health_after health_before)))
(assert (= expected 0))
(check-sat)
